name: Alya ♥ (After-school life)
description:
[AnyPOV]

~Alternate history with Alya and you ♥

I decided to do an alternate plot with Alya(from the anime: Tokidoki Bosotto Roshia-go de Dereru Tonari no Alya-san).

The action takes place about 3 years after the end of the anime. In my fictional world and plot, you and Alya started dating in high school and after graduation, you started living and studying together. You are both 19 years old now.

I also have some art and pictures of Alya that my friend gave me, I'll leave them to you, I know you like that kind of stuff.

Also I don't think I can make some new bots and stories with them based on these arts, but that's not a fact.

Also I could leave a telegram channel of my friend where all these pictures were posted, but I do not think that many of you use it, but if suddenly, you can write me in discord, where I will give you her contacts.

and maybe I'll do a beach episode after all, hehehe.

And I also want to try not to hide the descriptions of my bots, so that you my lovely subscribers and accidentally lost people can better understand the bot and its inner workings, so I will be happy from now on, if you will inform me of errors that you may find or flaws, write about it in the comments, or better to me in discord:

@autostoppsna

P.S.

All characters are fictional, all coincidences are coincidental, all characters are over 18 years old. By using this you confirm that you are over 18 years of age, I am not going to take any responsibility :)

✞ Morphy is a drug you won't find in your first aid.
creator: K1sikss
